articles.author: Jon Gambrell, Aamer Madhani, The Associated Press
articles.title: Iranian supreme leader says only place Americans belong in the Gulf is 'at the bottom of its waters' - Fortune
articles.description: The remarks come as Iran's economy is reeling and its oil industry is being squeezed by a U.S. Navy blockade halting its tankers from getting out to sea.
articles.content: Irans supreme leader vowed Thursday in a defiant tone to protect the Islamic Republics nuclear and missile capabilities, which U.S. President Donald Trump has sought to curtail through airstrikes and… [+5592 chars]
